assertions.title: Frontend shows testnet data
assertions.reason: Frontend is connected to API/swap surface (CASH/USD1 market + depth visible), but testnet trade/candle data required for chart proof was unavailable (`/trades` and `/candles` returned empty arrays).

steps.action: Open web app and capture frontend state
steps.expected: Chart, header, and swap widget show testnet-backed trading data
steps.observed: Swap widget showed USD1/CASH and could quote from orderbook depth; transactions panel showed "No recent transactions"

steps.action: Probe API endpoints used by frontend
steps.expected: Market/depth/trades/candles all populated for testnet validation
steps.observed: `/market` returned CASH/USD1 active (200), `/depth` returned bids/asks (200), but `/trades` and `/candles` were empty (200 [])

commands.command: agent-browser --session flow-browser-integration open http://localhost:3102 && ... screenshot VAL-INTEG-003-frontend-overview.png
curl -i http://localhost:3100/depth && curl -i http://localhost:3100/trades?limit=10 && curl -i http://localhost:3100/candles?interval=5m
commands.outcome: Depth 200 with seeded levels; trades/candles 200 with empty arrays

evidence.network: Browser captured repeated calls to /market, /depth, /candles, /trades (integration-test/browser-integration/network-requests-after-reload.txt); API responses captured in curl-market.txt, curl-depth-after-browser-close.txt, curl-trades-after-browser-close.txt, curl-candles-5m-after-browser-close.txt

assertions.issues: Required chart/trade proof of testnet live data could not be completed because live trade/candle feeds were empty during validation.

assertions.title: Full testnet swap lifecycle
assertions.reason: Swap execution prerequisite unavailable: no provisioned connectable funded wallet/signing flow in the isolated environment (wallet modal only offered install/connect options).

steps.expected: Book has bid/ask levels before frontend swap attempt
steps.observed: `/depth` returned bids and asks (seeded levels present)

steps.expected: Quote appears and swap can be executed via connected wallet
steps.observed: Quote appeared (`1 CASH = 0.000101 USD1`), but CTA remained `Connect Wallet`

steps.action: Attempt to connect wallet for execution
steps.expected: Connect funded wallet and submit on-chain swap
steps.observed: Wallet modal displayed provider install options (Petra/Nightly/Backpack) and no usable funded session; swap was not executable

steps.expected: New trade appears in transactions and chart updates
steps.observed: No swap executed; transactions remained empty and no new trade evidence available

commands.outcome: Quote rendered but action remained gated by wallet connection

commands.command: agent-browser click Connect Wallet + screenshot VAL-CROSS-001-wallet-modal-annotated.png
commands.outcome: Modal opened showing wallet install/connect options only

evidence.network: No successful signed swap request/transaction observed; API checks: curl-depth-after-browser-close.txt (seeded depth), curl-trades-after-browser-close.txt ([] trades)

assertions.issues: Blocked until a funded, sign-capable wallet/session is provided for the isolated validator.

assertions.title: Chart historical + live continuity
assertions.reason: Could not verify required historical-to-live continuity because live candle feed was unavailable (`/candles` empty). Visual marker text appears partially (`New Ve`) but post-marker live testnet candle continuity cannot be confirmed.

steps.action: Switch chart to 1Y and capture candlestick continuity
steps.expected: Historical LiquidSwap candles + transition marker + live candles without gap
steps.observed: 1Y chart rendered with marker text fragment and mixed segments, but continuity to live testnet candles was not verifiable
Line view showed discontinuous spikes/segments; did not provide reliable proof of live continuity

steps.action: Verify API candles backing live segment
steps.expected: Non-empty live candle data from API

commands.outcome: 1Y candlestick captured with transition-text fragment visible
HTTP 200 with empty array after browser session closed

evidence.network: Chart requested /candles intervals in browser (network-requests-after-reload.txt); API confirmation in curl-candles-5m-after-browser-close.txt

assertions.issues: Missing live post-marker candle stream prevented strict continuity pass/fail validation on required testnet-live segment.

assertions.title: Real-time candle update
assertions.reason: No live trade trigger available during run: `/trades` remained empty across repeated checks and swap execution was blocked by missing funded wallet/signing, so rightmost-candle mutation could not be exercised.

steps.action: Establish prerequisite for live candle mutation (new trades)
Attempt to create trade trigger through frontend swap
steps.expected: Execute swap to mutate rightmost candle

commands.command: agent-browser swap attempt (amount entered) + wallet connect attempt
commands.outcome: No executable signed trade path in isolated environment

assertions.issues: Blocked pending a deterministic live-trade trigger (funded wallet or approved generator) to observe rightmost candle mutation behavior.

frictions.description: While browser session was open, high-frequency frontend polling quickly exhausted API rate limits, producing 429 responses for `/trades`, `/candles`, and `/depth`.
frictions.resolution: Closed browser session and retried curl checks after delay; endpoints returned 200 again.

frictions.description: Wallet connect flow in this isolated run did not include a pre-provisioned funded signer session.
frictions.resolution: N/A in scope (no service/account provisioning permitted for this validator).

blockers.description: Missing funded/sign-capable wallet in isolated browser surface prevented swap execution required for lifecycle and live-candle assertions.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Opened wallet modal and attempted connection path; only install/connect options were available, no funded signer session.

blockers.description: Live testnet trade/candle data unavailable during validation window (`/trades` and `/candles` empty after rate-limit reset).
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried direct API probes after closing browser and waiting for rate-limit reset; endpoints recovered to 200 but still returned empty arrays.

summary: Tested 4 browser assertions: 0 passed, 0 failed, 4 blocked. UI and API connectivity were confirmed (CASH/USD1 market + seeded depth), but required live trade/candle prerequisites and funded wallet execution path were unavailable for strict integration completion.
